headline: Eversource Energy: Double-Digit Annual Return Potential During The Next 5 Years

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Eversource Energy, Lowers Price Target to $75
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $79 to $75.
